name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLE state

Init == /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> "idle"]

Next == \/ \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ state[i] = "idle"
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "trying"]
        \/ \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ state[i] = "trying"
          /\ \A j \in 1..N : j # i => state[j] # "critical"
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "critical"]
        \/ \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ state[i] = "critical"
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "idle"]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state>>

TypeOK == /\ state \in [1..N -> {"idle", "trying", "critical"}]
====

name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES participants, coordinator, messages

(* Participants are numbered 1..N *)
Participants == 1..N

(* Messages are tuples: [sender \in Participants \cup {coordinator},
                        receiver \in Participants \cup {coordinator},
                        type \in {"Prepare", "VoteYes", "VoteNo", "Commit", "Abort"},
                        payload \in BOOLEAN] *)

Init ==
  /\ participants = [i \in Participants |-> "Idle"]
  /\ coordinator = "Idle"
  /\ messages = <<>>

Prepare ==
  /\ coordinator = "Idle"
  /\ coordinator' = "Preparing"
  /\ messages' = Append(messages, [sender |-> coordinator,
                                   receiver |-> i,
                                   type |-> "Prepare",
                                   payload |-> TRUE]) \* payload unused
  /\ UNCHANGED participants

VoteYes ==
  /\ \E i \in Participants :
       /\ participants[i] = "Idle"
       /\ messages = <<[sender |-> coordinator,
                         receiver |-> i,
                         type |-> "Prepare",
                         payload |-> TRUE]>> \* only one Prepare message
       /\ participants' = [participants EXCEPT ![i] = "VotingYes"]
       /\ coordinator' = "Idle"
       /\ messages' = <<[sender |-> i,
                         receiver |-> coordinator,
                         type |-> "VoteYes",
                         payload |-> TRUE]>> \* payload unused
  /\ UNCHANGED <<>>

VoteNo ==
  /\ \E i \in Participants :
       /\ participants[i] = "Idle"
       /\ messages = <<[sender |-> coordinator,
                         receiver |-> i,
                         type |-> "Prepare",
                         payload |-> TRUE]>> \* only one Prepare message
       /\ participants' = [participants EXCEPT ![i] = "VotingNo"]
       /\ coordinator' = "Idle"
       /\ messages' = <<[sender |-> i,
                         receiver |-> coordinator,
                         type |-> "VoteNo",
                         payload |-> TRUE]>> \* payload unused
  /\ UNCHANGED <<>>

Commit ==
  /\ coordinator = "Idle"
  /\ \E i \in Participants :
       /\ participants[i] = "VotingYes"
       /\ messages = <<[sender |-> i,
                         receiver |-> coordinator,
                         type |-> "VoteYes",
                         payload |-> TRUE]>> \* only one VoteYes message
       /\ participants' = [participants EXCEPT ![i] = "Committed"]
       /\ coordinator' = "Idle"
       /\ messages' = <<[sender |-> coordinator,
                         receiver |-> i,
                         type |-> "Commit",
                         payload |-> TRUE]>> \* payload unused
  /\ UNCHANGED <<>>

Abort ==
  /\ coordinator = "Idle"
  /\ \E i \in Participants :
       /\ participants[i] = "VotingNo"
       /\ messages = <<[sender |-> i,
                         receiver |-> coordinator,
                         type |-> "VoteNo",
                         payload |-> TRUE]>> \* only one VoteNo message
       /\ participants' = [participants EXCEPT ![i] = "Aborted"]
       /\ coordinator' = "Idle"
       /\ messages' = <<[sender |-> coordinator,
                         receiver |-> i,
                         type |-> "Abort",
                         payload |-> TRUE]>> \* payload unused
  /\ UNCHANGED <<>>

Next == Prepare \/ VoteYes \/ VoteNo \/ Commit \/ Abort

TypeOK ==
  /\ participants \in [Participants -> {"Idle", "VotingYes", "VotingNo", "Committed", "Aborted"}]
  /\ coordinator \in {"Idle", "Preparing"}
  /\ messages \in Seq([sender \in Participants \cup {coordinator})

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<participants, coordinator, messages>>

====

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES forks, state, can

(* Forks: forks[i] = i if fork i is free, otherwise forks[i] = j if philosopher j holds fork i *)
(* State: state[i] = "thinking" | "hungry" | "eating" *)

Init == /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> i]
        /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

Left(i) == IF i = 1 THEN N ELSE i - 1
Right(i) == IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1

CanEat(i) == forks[Left(i)] = i /\ forks[Right(i)] = i

TakeForks(i) == /\ forks'[Left(i)] = i
              /\ forks'[Right(i)] = i
              /\ state'[i] = "eating"

PutForks(i) == /\ forks'[Left(i)] = Left(i)
             /\ forks'[Right(i)] = Right(i)
             /\ state'[i] = "thinking"

Hungry(i) == state'[i] = "hungry"

Next == \/ \E i \in 1..N : state[i] = "thinking" /\ CanEat(i) /\ TakeForks(i)
      \/ \E i \in 1..N : state[i] = "eating" /\ PutForks(i)
      \/ \E i \in 1..N : state[i] = "thinking" /\ PutForks(i)  (* philosopher gives up if can't eat *)
      \/ \E i \in 1..N : state[i] = "thinking" /\ Hungry(i)

TypeOK == /\ forks \in [1..N -> 1..N]
        /\ state \in [1..N -> {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, state>>

====

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


CONSTANT N

VARIABLES num, flag

(* num[i] is the ticket number of process i; 0 means not choosing a number *)
(* flag[i] is TRUE if process i is choosing a number *)

Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == 
  \E i \in 1..N :
    /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
    /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 1 + Max(Seq(1..N))]
    /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<num, flag>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

(* Mutual exclusion: no two processes can be in the critical section simultaneously *)
TypeOK == /\ num \in [1..N -> Nat]
           /\ flag \in [1..N -> BOOLEAN]

====

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, size

(* q is a sequence of length K, holding the queue contents *)
(* head is the index of the next element to dequeue *)
(* tail is the index of the next free slot for enqueue *)
(* size is the current number of elements in the queue *)

Init == /\ q = <<>>  (* empty sequence *)
        /\ head = 0
        /\ tail = 0
        /\ size = 0

Enqueue(v) == 
    /\ size < K
    /\ q' = Append(q, v)
    /\ tail' = (tail + 1) \mod K
    /\ size' = size + 1
    /\ head' = head

Dequeue == 
    /\ size > 0
    /\ head' = (head + 1) \mod K
    /\ size' = size - 1
    /\ q' = SubSeq(q, 0, size - 1)  (* remove the first element *)
    /\ tail' = tail

Next == Enqueue(v) \/ Dequeue

TypeOK == /\ K \in Nat
          /\ K > 0
          /\ q \in Seq(1..K)
          /\ head \in 0..K-1
          /\ tail \in 0..K-1
          /\ size \in 0..K

====

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state

Init ==
  /\ currentTerm = 0
  /\ votedFor = NULL
  /\ state = "Follower"

Next ==
  \/ /\ state = "Follower"
     /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
     /\ votedFor' = NULL
     /\ state' = "Candidate"
  \/ /\ state = "Candidate"
     /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
     /\ votedFor' = NULL
     /\ state' = "Leader"

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

====
